panels.title: Gateways Reporting
panels.description: Distinct gateways (≈ user machines) currently sending metrics.

panels.title: LLM Requests (range)
panels.description: Total chat requests across all surfaces in the selected time range.

panels.title: Active Sessions
panels.description: Stateful (X-Session-Id) sessions currently registered fleet-wide.

panels.title: Error Rate
panels.description: 5xx responses as a share of all HTTP traffic (5m).

panels.title: Kiro Credits (range)
panels.description: kiro credits consumed across the fleet in the range.

panels.title: Unhealthy Gateways
panels.description: Gateways whose pool cannot currently serve.

panels.title: Usage — Who & How Tools Are Used
LLM Requests by Surface
panels.description: Request rate split by API surface (anthropic/openai/ollama).

panels.title: LLM Requests by Skill
panels.description: Which invoking skill (X-GW-Skill / X-Flow-Name) is driving traffic.

panels.title: Requests by Client
panels.description: X-GW-Client attribution over the range.

panels.title: Requests by Model
panels.description: Requested model (canonical Model; empty/auto→auto).

panels.title: Requests by Gateway (across users)
panels.description: Total LLM requests per gateway (≈ per user) in the range.

panels.title: Top Skills

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by(skill)(increase(gw_llm_requests_total{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway", surface=~"$surface", skill=~"$skill", client=~"$client"}[$__range])))

panels.description: Busiest skills in the range.

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by(client, surface)(increase(gw_llm_requests_total{job="otto-gateway", instance=~"$gateway", surface=~"$surface", skill=~"$skill", client=~"$client"}[$__range])))

panels.title: Request Rate by Status
panels.description: HTTP status distribution over time.

panels.title: Latency p50 / p95 / p99
panels.description: Request duration quantiles.

panels.title: Latency Distribution (heatmap)
panels.description: Full request-latency histogram over time.

panels.title: Turn Duration p50 / p95
panels.description: kiro turn wall-time quantiles.

panels.title: Context Window Usage p95
panels.description: End-of-turn context utilization (higher ⇒ closer to a recycle).

panels.title: MCP Server Init Outcomes
panels.description: ok/fail init counts per MCP server.

panels.title: Pool Slots (alive / busy) by Gateway
panels.description: Warm slots alive vs checked-out, per gateway.

panels.title: Session Lifecycle Rate
panels.description: Created / recycled (context threshold) / reaped (idle).

panels.title: Slot Respawns & Ping Escalations
panels.description: Pool self-healing activity — spikes flag flapping workers.

panels.title: Gateway Health Matrix
panels.description: One row per gateway — current pool posture at a glance.

panels.title: Gateway Process CPU %
panels.description: Whole-gateway-process CPU (does not include worker subprocesses).

panels.title: Per-Worker CPU %
panels.description: Each kiro-cli worker subprocess, by gateway and slot.

panels.title: Goroutines (if go_* shipped)
panels.description: Populated only if GW_METRICS_SERIES_PREFIXES includes go_ (default excludes it).

panels.title: Gateways — Version & Build
panels.description: Build identity per reporting gateway.
